---
title: "Media"
subtitle: "7,494 posts where this was the primary topic."
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #3F5F7F !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [4, 3, 73, 263, 301, 160, 528, 353, 304, 304, 696, 807, 7, 682, 1184, 876, 653, 296],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#3F5F7F" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>https truthsocial</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>truthsocial com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>com users</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>users realdonaldtrump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>realdonaldtrump statuses</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>com news</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>fake news</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>com politics</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>foxnews com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>www breitbart</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>breitbart com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>www foxnews</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#3F5F7F'>www rsbnetwork</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

<div class="post-stream">

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2023  12:02</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Fake News Media, like CNN, MSDNC (MSNBC) The Washington Post, The Failing New York Times, are doing really badly and closing up shop all over the place. CNN is shuttering its longtime Headquarters Building, and the money losing Washington Post is being peddled all over the place while they fire 🔥 massive numbers of people. Not reporting with credibility has its consequences! The future for Fake News looks bleak, but beware the Marxists &amp;amp; Communists, which are well represented in our Government!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109761065800192435" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109761065800192435" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2023  20:48</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">The Fake News media like CNN, MSDNC which is sometimes referred to as MSNBC, the Washington Compost which is sometimes referred to as the Washington Post, and the Failing New York Times are all doing really, really badly. The future of the Fake News looks bleak and that&#x27;s a positive thing! https://rumble.com/v27v6hw-the-fake-news-media-is-hurting.html</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109785784810903618" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109785784810903618" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 13, 2023  03:01</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">“CNN suffers devastating 83% loss in viewership as Trump’s ratings skyrocket.” D.C. Enquirer   MSDNC (MSNBC) is doing really badly also. Too bad, Fake News just doesn’t sell any longer!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110013740996753718" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110013740996753718" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 25, 2017  11:09</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;FAKE NEWS media knowingly doesn&#x27;t tell the truth. A great danger to our country. The failing @nytimes has become a joke. Likewise @CNN. Sad!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_835325771858251776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/835325771858251776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 30, 2018  08:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;CNN and others in the Fake News Business keep purposely and inaccurately reporting that I said the “Media is the Enemy of the People.” Wrong! I said that the “Fake News (Media) is the Enemy of the People</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1057059603605831680" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1057059603605831680" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 05, 2019  21:49</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Media is “Fixed” and Corrupt. It bears no relationship to the truth. The @nytimes &amp;amp; @washingtonpost are pure fiction. Totally dishonest reporting!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1180480067849338881" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1180480067849338881" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2023  00:54</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">People aren’t buying Fake News anymore. It will only get worse for the Washington Post, the Failing New York Times, and all of the Networks and other Lamestream Media that don’t report the news as it is. https://dcenquirer.com/trump-proven-right-as-the-washington-post-loses-500k-subscribers-and-70-million-since-he-left-office/</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109849034761818591" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109849034761818591" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2019  20:22</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;.....”Journalism” has reached a new low in the history of our Country. It is nothing more than an evil propaganda machine for the Democrat Party. The reporting is so false</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1163063728218263552" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1163063728218263552" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 20, 2019  21:49</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The New York Times reporting is false. They are a true ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1098218016255414272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1098218016255414272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:43</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Mainstream Media has NEVER been more dishonest than it is now. NBC and MSNBC are going Crazy. They report stories</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083207607412760576" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083207607412760576" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 04, 2017  22:47</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;NBC news is #FakeNews and more dishonest than even CNN. They are a disgrace to good reporting. No wonder their news ratings are way down!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_915589297096536065" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/915589297096536065" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2017  05:48</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The FAKE NEWS media (failing @nytimes</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_832708293516632065" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/832708293516632065" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:50</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;RT @parscale: This is just one of many fake news stories over the last several years. Sad so many journalists have lost their integrity. I hope @cnn and @msnbc step up and call this for what it is. https://t.co/LSrMYomaj3&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086440620640604161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086440620640604161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2023  16:42</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT: https://truthsocial.com/users/Grandoldmemes/statuses/109713740580151253After many years, CNN is closing their Atlanta Headquarters. No Ratings = No Money. That’s what FAKE NEWS gets you! Likewise, speaking of FAKE NEWS, MSDNC is in BIG trouble. Be careful FOXNEWS, don’t go that way. They’ve got failed politician, Paul Ryan, and RINO Karl Rove, a total loser, running things!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109728191217314723" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109728191217314723" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 20, 2019  23:33</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The LameStream Media is far beyond Fake News</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1163836348819750912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1163836348819750912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2020  09:07</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;This is Fake News by the failing @nytimes &amp;amp; bad ratings @CNN. Never suggested it although</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1292628590425759747" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1292628590425759747" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 11, 2019  13:06</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The News Media in our Country is FAKE and in many cases</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1204839933430644736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1204839933430644736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 11, 2017  05:18</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Very little discussion of all the purposely false and defamatory stories put out this week by the Fake News Media. They are out of control - correct reporting means nothing to them. Major lies written</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_939967625362276354" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/939967625362276354" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2019  16:46</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;According to Fake News (and low ratings) @ CNN</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1143999063613853696" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1143999063613853696" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  19:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The fake news media is going crazy with their conspiracy theories and blind hatred. @MSNBC &amp;amp; @CNN are unwatchable. @foxandfriends is great!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831830548565852160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831830548565852160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2025  02:10</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">FAKE NEWS CNN IS SO DISGUSTING AND INCOMPETENT. SOME OF THE DUMBEST ANCHORS IN THE BUSINESS!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114747234182168375" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114747234182168375" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 18, 2022  15:39</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MSNBC and CNN had their Worst-Rated Years EVER—down 21% and 33% overall, and 39% and 36% among viewers 25-54 (Key Demo).This is only because they are against “Trump&quot;—but also because they are losers, and always will be, with their ideology. FAKE NEWS!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109535426389845351" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109535426389845351" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 31, 2022  08:13</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">The Failing New York Times is Fake and Corrupt News. Their motto should be, ALL THE FAKE NEWS THAT’S UNFIT TO PRINT. They are the Enemy of the People!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109607284710883801" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109607284710883801" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2018  20:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;“Anonymous Sources are really starting to BURN the media.” @FoxNews The fact is that many anonymous sources don’t even exist. They are fiction made up by the Fake News reporters. Look at the lie that Fake CNN is now in. They got caught red handed! Enemy of the People!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1034782741714399232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1034782741714399232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 16, 2019  03:04</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Corrupt News Media is totally out of control - they have given up and don’t even care anymore. Mainstream Media has ZERO CREDIBILITY - TOTAL LOSERS!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1139971974854258688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1139971974854258688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 22, 2025  13:12</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MSNBC, COMMONLY KNOWN AS MSDNC, IS A THREAT TO OUR DEMOCRACY. SUCH LYING AND MISREPRESENTATION. BAD PEOPLE AT THE TOP!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114047709471578461" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114047709471578461" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 10, 2022  06:44</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Incredible how dishonest the Fake News Media is.The Failing New York Times has gone crazy. So many of the people I Endorsed went on to victory on Tuesday Night, nobody was even close, and they literally make up a story refusing to write the facts, and only quoting enemies and losers. Almost all of the people I endorsed WON, yet if you read the story from two Trump hating writers (who only do as they are told!), you would not even recognize the truth. They truly are, THE ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE!!!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109318153501562995" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109318153501562995" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 09, 2017  21:02</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Fake News CNN made a vicious and purposeful mistake yesterday. They were caught red handed</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_939480342779580416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/939480342779580416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 03, 2020  19:57</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Fake News doesn’t show real polls. Lamestream Media is totally CORRUPT</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1256915740432760835" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1256915740432760835" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2020  20:33</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;....very often FAKE NEWS. Lamestream Media should be forced to reveal sources</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1243878883931435010" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1243878883931435010" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2020  22:16</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;....very often FAKE NEWS. Lamestream Media should be forced to reveal sources</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1243904684257091585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1243904684257091585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 31, 2018  21:34</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Fake News Media is going CRAZY! They are totally unhinged and in many ways</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1024287257975566338" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1024287257975566338" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2020  12:45</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Fake News Media is looking hard for the Big Democrat Story</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1227453711540269057" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1227453711540269057" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 20, 2019  19:20</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Mainstream Media has never been as corrupt and deranged as it is today. FAKE NEWS is actually the biggest story of all and is the true ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE! That’s why they refuse to cover the REAL Russia Hoax. But the American people are wise to what is going on.....&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1130433207487336450" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1130433207487336450" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2025  01:59</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Despite a very high popularity and, according to many, among the greatest 8 months in Presidential History, ABC &amp; NBC FAKE NEWS, two of the worst and most biased networks in history, give me 97% BAD STORIES. IF THAT IS THE CASE, THEY ARE SIMPLY AN ARM OF THE DEMOCRAT PARTY AND SHOULD, ACCORDING TO MANY, HAVE THEIR LICENSES REVOKED BY THE FCC. I would be totally in favor of that because they are so biased and untruthful, an actual threat to our Democracy!!! MAGA</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115086929873163909" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115086929873163909" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 08, 2019  07:50</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Watching @FoxNews weekend anchors is worse than watching low ratings Fake News @CNN</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1148016422783803392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1148016422783803392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 30, 2018  08:14</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Check out tweets from last two days. I refer to Fake News Media when mentioning Enemy of the People - but dishonest reporters use only the word “Media.” The people of our Great Country are angry and disillusioned at receiving so much Fake News. They get it</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1057063101189836801" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1057063101189836801" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2022  18:12</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Fox News is no longer Fox News. They won’t even show or discuss the greatest &amp;amp; most impactful documentary of our time, “2000 Mules.” The Radical Left Democrats are thrilled - They don’t want the TRUTH to get out. Depressing to watch what has happened to Fox! CNN should go Conservative and take over the greatest, strongest, and most powerful BASE in U.S. history. Nobody is watching CNN’s Fake News now so, as I say, what the hell have they got to lose? Sadly, they&#x27;re to stupid to make the change!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_108301643577625757" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/108301643577625757" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 04, 2018  18:45</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;NBC NEWS is wrong again! They cite “sources” which are constantly wrong. Problem is</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_992354530510721025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/992354530510721025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 17, 2017  20:17</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The Fake Media (not Real Media) has gotten even worse since the election. Every story is badly slanted. We have to hold them to the truth!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_853945633903923200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/853945633903923200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

</div>

::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
